direction:
i want to use the concept of the image attached for duberymnl. please make sure lenses are reflecting its correct environment.
- Warm studio portrait of a Filipino male model in a 3/4 head-and-shoulders crop against a solid warm tan/taupe seamless backdrop, tight close framing — swapping the reference sunglasses for a DuberyMNL SKU.
- Model wears an olive tank top, has short curly textured hair, natural tan skin, and warm directional key lighting — I'll keep that mood and wardrobe palette.
- Lenses will reflect the warm studio environment (tan backdrop + soft key highlight), not outdoor scenery. Clean, no overlays, no text, 4:5 by default.

Hit Generate when ready.
